name: CP LegalMed Consulting
description: Legal nurse consultant provides litigation support, specializing in critical care, interventional radiology, and medical surgical and discharge planning. Services include: case review for merit; medical records summaries and written reports.[1]

name: Our Legal Nurse Consultants, LLC
description: Certified legal nurse, experienced in neonatal ICU, pediatric ICU, pediatrics, women’s health care, emergency dept. Services include: screen cases for merit; define standards of care; organize medical records. Also serves as a NICU expert witness.[1]
